data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of booking cancellation if the checklist is not complete. However, the provided evidence does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case explicitly states the need for booking cancellation under this condition, but there is no evidence demonstrating that this requirement has been implemented, indicating a clear gap.
gaps: No evidence of booking cancellation if checklist not complete.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the booking cancellation functionality.
